caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, black headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed in gold letters sits at a desk in a studio setting. He wears a gold chain and a gold watch on his left wrist. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. Behind him is a white banner featuring a gold star and the words "UNICORN HUSTLE" repeated. In the background, a blue wall contains the text "'Where BOSSES Talk!'". On the desk, a black container with red and white text that reads "THE TALK OUT GAME" is visible. A small logo in the bottom left corner also says "THE TALK OUT GAME". Throughout the sequence, the man remains stationary and maintains a serious expression, looking slightly to the side, with no significant changes in his posture or the environment.
